zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield於1454年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭時，她的父親Thomas Eaglesfield29歲，母親Mary Weston28歲。她於1474年與Sir Anthony Hancock在英國英格蘭德比夏爾斯特費爾德結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1502年5月9日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年48歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield于1454年出生在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭时，她的父亲Thomas Eaglesfield29岁，母亲Mary Weston28岁。她于1474年与Sir Anthony Hancock在英国英格兰德比夏爾斯特費爾德结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1502年5月9日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年48岁，埋葬在英国薩默塞特。

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named in the Harz Mountains and Württemberg.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield was born in 1454, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Eaglesfield, was 29 and her mother, Mary Weston, was 28. She married Sir Anthony Hancock in 1474, in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 9 May 1502, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield est née en 1454, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Eaglesfield, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Mary Weston, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Anthony Hancock en 1474, à Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 9 mai 1502, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterrée à Somerset, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield 1454 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Eaglesfield 29 und ihre Mutter Mary Weston 28. Sie hat 1474 in Chesterfield, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Anthony Hancock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 9. Mai 1502 im Alter von 48 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield è nata il nel 1454 nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Eaglesfield, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Mary Weston, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Anthony Hancock nel 1474, nel Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 9 maggio 1502, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolta a Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfieldが1454年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドで生まれた時，父Thomas Eaglesfieldは29歳，母Mary Westonは28歳であった。1474年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアチェステルフィールドでSir Anthony Hancockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1502年5月9日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで48歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield(이)가 1454년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Eaglesfield(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Weston(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1474년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 체스터필드에서 Sir Anthony Hancock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1502년 5월 9일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield nasceu em 1454, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Eaglesfield, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Mary Weston, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Anthony Hancock em 1474, em Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 9 de maio de 1502, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultada em Somerset, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield родилась в 1454 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Eaglesfield было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Weston, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Anthony Hancock в 1474 г. в местности честирфиелд, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 9 мая 1502 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и была похоронена в местности сомирсет, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Joan Holbach Eaglesfield nació en 1454, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Eaglesfield, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Mary Weston, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Anthony Hancock en 1474, en Chesterfield, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1502, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultada en Somerset, Inglaterra.
